thing-type.label: SmartThings Presence Sensor
thing-type.description: A SmartThings presence sensor or mobile phone showing home/away state.

parameter.name: deviceId
parameter.label: Device ID
parameter.description: SmartThings device UUID. Find it via GET https://api.smartthings.com/v1/devices.

parameter.name: pollingIntervalSeconds
parameter.label: Polling Interval (s)
parameter.description: How often to poll the SmartThings API for status updates.

channel-type.label: Authorization Status
channel-type.description: Shows whether the SmartThings account is authorized. Authorize at http(s)://[YOUR_OPENHAB]/smartthingscloud
